profile.iucnHabitatDetail: Marine Coastal/Supratidal - Coastal Freshwater Lakes; Marine Intertidal - Shingle and/or Pebble Shoreline and/or Beaches; Grassland - Temperate; Wetlands (inland) - Permanent Freshwater Lakes (over 8ha); Shrubland - Temperate; Marine Intertidal - Sandy Shoreline and/or Beaches, Sand Bars, Spits, Etc; Artificial/Terrestrial - Pastureland
